metadata.title: [zh-tw] Git
metadata.description: Git 繁體中文化與微調
metadata.author: Chico

ast.name: ariaLabel
ast.target: 自動例行程序目前已暫停。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error while adding askpass script to exclude file:
ast.target: 將 askpass 腳本加入排除檔案時發生錯誤：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to parse lines, starting in 0!
ast.target: 解析行失敗，從 0 開始！

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unknown state reached while processing groups of lines
ast.target: 處理行群組時進入未知狀態

ast.name: info
ast.source: A fatal exception occurred in a previous task, the queue has been purged: %o
ast.target: A fatal exception occurred in a previous task, the queue has been purged: %o

ast.name: info
ast.source: exitCode=%s handling with custom error handler
ast.target: exitCode=%s handling with custom error handler

ast.name: info
ast.source: custom error handler treated as success
ast.target: custom error handler treated as success

ast.name: info
ast.source: handling as error: exitCode=%s stdErr=%s rejection=%o
ast.target: handling as error: exitCode=%s stdErr=%s rejection=%o

ast.name: log
ast.source: No tracking branch found. Ignoring pull of main repo and updating submodules only.
ast.target: 找不到追蹤分支。將忽略主儲存庫的拉取，只更新子模組。

ast.name: log
ast.source: No tracking branch found. Ignoring push of main repo and updating submodules only.
ast.target: 找不到追蹤分支。將忽略主儲存庫的推送，只更新子模組。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Encountered network error, but already in offline mode
ast.target: 遇到網路錯誤，但已處於離線模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to use one interval for commit and another for sync.
ast.target: 啟用後，可分別設定提交與同步的時間間隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Push commits every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.
ast.target: 每 X 分鐘推送提交。設為 0（預設）可停用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pull changes every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.
ast.target: 每 X 分鐘拉取變更。設為 0（預設）可停用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You will get a pop up to specify your message.
ast.target: 會跳出視窗讓你指定提交訊息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Available placeholders: {{date}} (see below), {{hostname}} (see below), {{numFiles}} (number of changed files in the commit) and {{files}} (changed files in commit message).
ast.target: 可用佔位符：{{date}}（見下方）、{{hostname}}（見下方）、{{numFiles}}（此次提交中變更的檔案數量）以及 {{files}}（提交訊息中的變更檔案）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A script that is run using 'sh -c' to generate the commit message. May be used to generate commit messages using AI tools. Available placeholders: {{hostname}}, {{date}}.
ast.target: 使用 'sh -c' 執行、用來產生提交訊息的腳本。可用於透過 AI 工具產生提交訊息。可用佔位符：{{hostname}}、{{date}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify custom hostname for every device. Defaults to the OS hostname if not set on desktop.
ast.target: 為每台裝置指定自訂主機名稱。桌面端若未設定，預設使用作業系統主機名稱。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: Obsidian 啟動時自動拉取提交。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.
ast.target: Hunk 是編輯器中成組顯示的行變更區塊。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.
ast.target: 這可讓你在編輯器中透過彩色標記查看變更，並可暫存、重設或預覽單一 hunk。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the author of the commit in the history view.
ast.target: 在歷史檢視中顯示提交作者。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.
ast.target: 在歷史檢視中顯示提交日期。日期會使用 {{date}} 佔位符格式顯示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.
ast.target: 在較慢的電腦上可能造成延遲。如有這種情況，停用此選項即可。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Milliseconds to wait after file change before refreshing the Source Control View.
ast.target: 檔案變更後，重新整理原始碼控制檢視前等待的毫秒數。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.
ast.target: 設定差異檢視的樣式。請注意，「分割」模式中的實際差異不是由 Git 產生，而是由編輯器本身產生，因此可能不同於 Git 產生的 diff。這樣的優點是你可以在該檢視中編輯文字。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable informative notifications for git operations to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).
ast.target: 停用 Git 操作的資訊通知，以減少干擾（更新狀態請查看狀態列）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable error notifications of any kind to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).
ast.target: 停用所有錯誤通知，以減少干擾（更新狀態請查看狀態列）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Don't show notifications when there are no changes to commit or push.
ast.target: 沒有可提交或推送的變更時，不顯示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.
ast.target: 必須重新啟動 Obsidian，變更才會生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add "Stage", "Unstage" and "Add to .gitignore" actions to the file menu.
ast.target: 在檔案選單加入「暫存」、「取消暫存」與「加入 .gitignore」動作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Type in your password. You won't be able to see it again.
ast.target: 輸入你的密碼。之後將無法再次查看。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These settings usually don't need to be changed, but may be required for special setups.
ast.target: 這些設定通常不需要更改，但特殊配置可能會用到。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: "Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.
ast.target: 「提交並同步」與「拉取」會處理子模組。尚缺功能：衝突檔案、拉取/推送/提交的檔案數量。每個子模組都需要設定追蹤分支。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).
ast.target: 根儲存庫 checkout 時，也遞迴 checkout 子模組（若分支存在）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the path to the Git binary/executable. Git should already be in your PATH. Should only be necessary for a custom Git installation.
ast.target: 指定 Git binary/可執行檔路徑。Git 通常應已在 PATH 中；只有自訂 Git 安裝時才需要設定。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .
ast.target: 每一行設定一個新的環境變數，格式為 KEY=VALUE。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use each line for one path

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
ast.target:
設定執行 Git binary 時相對於 vault 的路徑。
             主要用於設定 Git 儲存庫路徑；只有當 Git 儲存庫位於 vault 根目錄下方時才需要。Windows 上請使用 "\\" 代替 "/"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\" instead of "/" on Windows.
ast.target: 對應 GIT_DIR 環境變數。需要重新啟動 Obsidian 才會生效。Windows 上請使用 "\" 代替 "/"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disables the plugin on this device. This setting is not synced.
ast.target: 在此裝置上停用插件。此設定不會同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.
ast.target: 如果你喜歡這個插件，可以考慮捐款支持持續開發。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If and how the author is displayed
ast.target: 是否以及如何顯示作者

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If and how the date and time of authoring the line is displayed
ast.target: 是否以及如何顯示該行的撰寫日期與時間

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Split timers for automatic commit and sync
ast.target: 將自動提交與同步使用不同計時器

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 手動提交時的提交訊息

ast.name: setName
ast.source: List filenames affected by commit in the commit body
ast.target: 在提交內容中列出受影響的檔名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Status bar with summary of line changes
ast.target: 在狀態列顯示行變更摘要

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatically refresh source control view on file changes
ast.target: 檔案變更時自動重新整理原始碼控制檢視

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 原始碼控制檢視重新整理間隔

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show the count of modified files in the status bar
ast.target: 在狀態列顯示已修改檔案數量

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Username on your git server. E.g. your username on GitHub
ast.target: Git 伺服器上的使用者名稱，例如你的 GitHub 使用者名稱

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自訂 Git binary 路徑

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 額外 PATH 環境變數路徑

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用新的環境變數重新載入

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自訂基礎路徑（Git 儲存庫路徑）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自訂 Git 目錄路徑（取代 '.git'）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show commit authoring information next to each line
ast.target: 在每一行旁顯示提交作者資訊

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Ignore whitespace and newlines in changes
ast.target: 在變更中忽略空白與換行

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Type your message and select optional the version with the added date.
ast.target: 輸入你的訊息，並可選擇附加日期的版本。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Not supported files will be opened by default app!
ast.target: 不支援的檔案將使用預設應用程式開啟！

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 選擇要 checkout 的分支

ast.name: setText
ast.source:
Debugging and logging:
You can always see the logs of this and every other plugin by opening the console with
ast.target:
偵錯與記錄：
你可以使用以下快捷鍵開啟控制台，查看此插件與其他插件的記錄

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在預設應用程式中開啟

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.source: Git: Error while loading line authoring feature.
ast.target: Git: Error while loading line authoring feature.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Git: Error while loading signs feature.
ast.target: Git: Error while loading signs feature.

ast.source: Git: View is not defined for editor cache key. Unforeseen situation. id:
ast.target: Git: View is not defined for editor cache key. Unforeseen situation. id:

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Authentication failed. Please try with different credentials
ast.target: 驗證失敗。請嘗試使用不同的憑證。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 這會花較久時間：正在取得狀態

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ObsidianGit: Base path does not exist

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.
ast.target: 必須重新啟動 Obsidian，變更才會生效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Debug information copied to clipboard. May contain sensitive information!
ast.target: 偵錯資訊已複製到剪貼簿。可能包含敏感資訊！

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已成功刪除儲存庫。正在重新載入插件...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Discarded all changes in tracked files.
ast.target: 已捨棄已追蹤檔案中的所有變更。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't find a valid git repository. Please create one via the given command or clone an existing repo.
ast.target: 找不到有效的 Git 儲存庫。請透過指定命令建立一個，或 clone 現有儲存庫。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 自動例行程序目前已暫停。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 無效深度。正在中止 clone。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Commit aborted: No commit message provided
ast.target: 提交已中止：未提供提交訊息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No upstream branch is set. Please select one.
ast.target: 尚未設定 upstream 分支。請選擇一個。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在 GitHub 上開啟檔案

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在 GitHub 上開啟檔案歷史紀錄

ast.name: name
ast.target: 提交並同步，然後關閉 Obsidian

ast.name: name
ast.target: 使用指定訊息提交並同步

ast.name: name
ast.source: Commit all changes with specific message
ast.target: 使用指定訊息提交所有變更

ast.name: name
ast.target: 使用指定訊息提交已暫存項目

ast.name: name
ast.target: 暫停/恢復自動例行程序

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 指定你的密碼/個人存取權杖

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Do you really want to delete the repository (.git directory)? plugin action cannot be undone.
ast.target: 你確定要刪除此儲存庫（.git 目錄）嗎？此插件動作無法復原。

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: This branch isn't merged into HEAD. Force delete?
ast.target: 此分支尚未合併到 HEAD。要強制刪除嗎？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Git is not ready. When all settings are correct you can configure commit-sync, etc.
ast.target: Git 尚未就緒。所有設定正確後，你可以設定提交同步等功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The commit hash, author name and authoring date can all be individually toggled.
ast.target: 提交雜湊、作者名稱與撰寫日期都可以個別切換。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hide everything, to only show the age-colored sidebar.
ast.target: 隱藏所有內容，只顯示依時間著色的側邊欄。

ast.name: text
ast.source: By default (deactivated), each line only shows the newest commit where it was changed.
ast.target: 預設（未啟用）每一行只會顯示最近一次變更它的提交。

ast.name: text
ast.source: , cut-copy-paste-ing of text is followed within the same commit and the original commit of authoring will be shown.
ast.target: 時，會在同一提交內追蹤文字剪下、複製、貼上，並顯示原始撰寫提交。

ast.name: text
ast.source: , cut-copy-paste-ing text inbetween multiple commits will be detected.
ast.target: 時，會偵測跨多個提交的文字剪下、複製、貼上。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
The time-zone in which the authoring date should be shown.
Either your local time-zone (default),
the author's time-zone during commit creation or
ast.target:
撰寫日期顯示時使用的時區。
可以是你的本地時區（預設）、
作者建立提交時的時區，或

ast.name: text
ast.source: The CSS color of the gutter text.
ast.target: gutter 文字的 CSS 顏色。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It is highly recommended to use

ast.name: text
ast.source: List of available CSS variables in Obsidian
ast.target: Obsidian 可用 CSS 變數清單

ast.name: text
ast.source: Whitespace and newlines are interpreted as part of the document and in changes by default (hence not ignored). This makes the last line being shown as 'changed' when a new subsequent line is added, even if the previously last line's text is the same.
ast.target: 空白與換行預設會被視為文件與變更的一部分（因此不會被忽略）。這會導致新增後續行時，即使原本最後一行文字相同，最後一行仍顯示為「已變更」。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you don't care about purely-whitespace changes (e.g. list nesting / quote indentation changes), then activating this will provide more meaningful change detection.
ast.target: 如果你不在意純空白變更（例如清單巢狀層級或引用縮排變化），啟用此選項可提供更有意義的變更偵測。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Supports 'rgb(r,g,b)', 'hsl(h,s,l)', hex (#) and named colors (e.g. 'black', 'purple'). Color preview:
ast.target: 支援 'rgb(r,g,b)'、'hsl(h,s,l)'、hex (#) 與命名顏色（例如 'black'、'purple'）。顏色預覽：

regex.target: setDesc("可用佔位符：{{date}}（見下方）、{{hostname}}（見下方）、{{numFiles}}（此次提交中變更的檔案數量）以及 {{files}}（提交訊息中的變更檔案）。")
setName("手動提交時的提交訊息")

regex.source: setDesc("A script that is run using 'sh -c' to generate the commit message. May be used to generate commit messages using AI tools. Available placeholders: {{hostname}}, {{date}}.")
regex.target: setDesc("使用 'sh -c' 執行、用來產生提交訊息的腳本。可用於透過 AI 工具產生提交訊息。可用佔位符：{{hostname}}、{{date}}。")

regex.source: setDesc("Specify custom hostname for every device. Defaults to the OS hostname if not set on desktop.")
regex.target: setDesc("Specify custom hostname for every device. Defaults to the OS hostname if not set on desktop.")

regex.source: setName("List filenames affected by commit in the commit body")
regex.target: setName("在提交內容中列出受影響的檔名")

regex.source: setDesc("Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.")
regex.target: setDesc("Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.")

regex.source: setDesc(`Most of the time you want to push after committing. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${i.settings.pullBeforePush?"and pull ":""}only. It will still be called commit-and-sync.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`多數時候你會希望提交後推送。關閉此選項後，提交並同步動作會變成只提交${i.settings.pullBeforePush?"並拉取 ":""}。它仍會被稱為提交並同步。`)

regex.source: setDesc(`On commit-and-sync, pull commits as well. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${i.settings.disablePush?"":"and push "}only.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`提交並同步時也拉取提交。關閉此選項後，提交並同步動作會變成只提交${i.settings.disablePush?"":"並推送 "}。`)

regex.source: setDesc("Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.")
regex.target: setDesc("Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.")

regex.source: setDesc("This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.")
regex.target: setDesc("This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.")

regex.source: setName("Status bar with summary of line changes")
regex.target: setName("在狀態列顯示行變更摘要")

regex.source: setDesc("Show the author of the commit in the history view.")
regex.target: setDesc("在歷史檢視中顯示提交作者。")

regex.source: setDesc("Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.")
regex.target: setDesc("在歷史檢視中顯示提交日期。日期會使用 {{date}} 佔位符格式顯示。")

regex.source: setName("Automatically refresh source control view on file changes")
regex.target: setName("檔案變更時自動重新整理原始碼控制檢視")

regex.source: setDesc("On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.")
regex.target: setDesc("在較慢的電腦上可能造成延遲。如有這種情況，停用此選項即可。")
setName("原始碼控制檢視重新整理間隔")

regex.source: setDesc("Milliseconds to wait after file change before refreshing the Source Control View.")
regex.target: setDesc("檔案變更後，重新整理原始碼控制檢視前等待的毫秒數。")

regex.source: setDesc('Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.')
regex.target: setDesc('Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.')

regex.source: setDesc("Disable informative notifications for git operations to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).")
regex.target: setDesc("停用 Git 操作的資訊通知，以減少干擾（更新狀態請查看狀態列）。")

regex.source: setDesc("Disable error notifications of any kind to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).")
regex.target: setDesc("停用所有錯誤通知，以減少干擾（更新狀態請查看狀態列）。")

regex.source: setDesc("Don't show notifications when there are no changes to commit or push.")
regex.target: setDesc("沒有可提交或推送的變更時，不顯示通知。")

regex.source: setDesc("Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.")
regex.target: setDesc("Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.")

regex.source: setDesc('Add "Stage", "Unstage" and "Add to .gitignore" actions to the file menu.')
regex.target: setDesc('Add "Stage", "Unstage" and "Add to .gitignore" actions to the file menu.')

regex.source: setName("Show the count of modified files in the status bar")
regex.target: setName("在狀態列顯示已修改檔案數量")

regex.source: setName("Username on your git server. E.g. your username on GitHub")
regex.target: setName("Username on your git server. E.g. your username on GitHub")

regex.source: setDesc("Type in your password. You won't be able to see it again.")
regex.target: setDesc("輸入你的密碼。之後將無法再次查看。")

regex.source: setDesc("These settings usually don't need to be changed, but may be required for special setups.")
regex.target: setDesc("這些設定通常不需要更改，但特殊配置可能會用到。")

regex.source: setDesc('"Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.')
regex.target: setDesc('"Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.')

regex.source: setDesc("Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).")
regex.target: setDesc("Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).")

regex.source: setDesc("Specify the path to the Git binary/executable. Git should already be in your PATH. Should only be necessary for a custom Git installation.")
regex.target: setDesc("Specify the path to the Git binary/executable. Git should already be in your PATH. Should only be necessary for a custom Git installation.")

regex.source: setDesc("Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .")
regex.target: setDesc("Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .")

regex.source: setDesc("Use each line for one path")

regex.target: setName("使用新的環境變數重新載入")

regex.source:
setDesc(`
            Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
            `)
regex.target:
setDesc(`
            Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
            `)

regex.source: setDesc('Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')
regex.target: setDesc('Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')

regex.source: setDesc("Disables the plugin on this device. This setting is not synced.")
regex.target: setDesc("在此裝置上停用插件。此設定不會同步。")

regex.source: Notice("Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.")
regex.target: Notice("必須重新啟動 Obsidian，變更才會生效。")

regex.source: setDesc("If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.")
regex.target: setDesc("如果你喜歡這個插件，可以考慮捐款支持持續開發。")

regex.target: Notice("偵錯資訊已複製到剪貼簿。可能包含敏感資訊！")
